meaning: n.欢跳,雀跃,嬉戏vi.欢跳,雀跃,耍闹
examples: Ron Gambol has become a household name.
You totally feel for your success that gambol justifiedly!
It's a real treat to have the opportunity to meet Dr. Gambol.
In the early hours, sea lions often gambol in the bay, and crabs skitter across the rocks.
Squeaking chipmunks, straight out of Snow White, gambol across the path.
